summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The JPMorgan Fundamental Data Science Large Growth ETF (LGDS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund seeks to provide long-term capital growth. LGDS was launched on Jul 10, 2026 and is issued by JPMorgan Chase.

holdings.infoBox: LGDS is an equity ETF with a total of 102 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 15.54%, Alphabet at 8.74%, Apple at 7.76%, Broadcom at 4.84%, and Meta Platforms at 3.84%.

summary.pre: ETF holdings data is provided by
summary.post: . Holdings are typically published by the ETF issuer at the end of each trading day.
